blind_rating_rebuilds_team_diff.claim: among ratings that never saw who won, PER rebuilds the most team point differential (73% out of sample)

bpm_vorp_tight.claim: BPM and VORP are tightly linked (r > 0.95)

consensus_stable_yoy.claim: the consensus order is largely stable from one season to the next (year-over-year rank agreement above 0.6)

consensus_top_fell_in_playoffs.claim: the regular-season consensus #1 (Nikola Jokić) fell in the playoffs

cumulative_are_power_laws.claim: the cumulative metrics (Win Shares, VORP) are power laws

cumulative_steeper_than_rate.claim: cumulative VORP falls off more steeply than rate-metric PER

example_defense_is_defense_led.claim: the defense example (Victor Wembanyama) draws more than a third of its BPM from defense

example_reps_distinct.claim: the example archetypes resolve to distinct players
example_reps_distinct.value: Nikola Jokić; Victor Wembanyama; Pascal Siakam; OG Anunoby; Jalen Brunson

example_split_per_over_bpm.claim: counting stats rate the split scorer (Pascal Siakam) well above where impact-aware BPM puts him

forecast_top_differs_from_description_to.claim: the metric that best forecasts next season is not the one that best describes the season just played

jokic_tops_consensus.claim: Nikola Jokić tops the consensus rating

panel_forecast_top_differs_from_describe.claim: across the full panel the best forecaster is not the best describer

panel_per_describes_better_than_forecast.claim: across the full panel PER describes better than it forecasts

per_describes_better_than_predicts.claim: PER describes the season far better than it forecasts the next

per_gamescore_close.claim: PER and Game Score track closely (r > 0.75)

playoff_top_faller_negative.claim: the top playoff faller (Jalen Duren) lost ground on the pool

playoff_top_riser_clears_band.claim: the top playoff riser (OG Anunoby) rose by more than the bounce of a few games (range excludes zero)

playoff_top_riser_positive.claim: the top playoff riser (OG Anunoby) gained on the pool

pwv_brunson_not_top5.claim: even with the playoffs weighted heavily Brunson stays outside the top 5 of the playoff pool

pwv_brunson_rises_with_playoffs.claim: weighting the playoffs more lifts Brunson's combined rank (from 15th to 7th)

rapm_diverges_from_box.claim: single-season RAPM diverges from the box-score systems (mean rank agreement below 0.40)

rapm_in_impact_panel.claim: RAPM is scored across the impact-era panel alongside the box scores

rapm_less_skewed_than_vorp.claim: RAPM is far less skewed than the right-skewed accumulation metric VORP

rapm_my_at_least_bpm_stable.claim: RAPM_MY is at least as stable year to year as BPM, so the prior-informed lineup signal adds to the box score rather than degrading it

rapm_my_beats_bare_consensus.claim: RAPM_MY tracks the consensus better than bare RAPM

rapm_my_forecasts_better_than_bare.claim: RAPM_MY forecasts next-season team results better than bare RAPM

rapm_splithalf_real.claim: bare RAPM's split-half reliability is well above the near-zero noise floor it sat at before the reconstruction fix

rapm_symmetric_not_powerlaw.claim: RAPM is a near-symmetric bell (skew near zero), not the heavy-tailed shape a power law needs

rapm_yoy_meaningful.claim: bare single-season RAPM now holds from one season to the next, year-over-year stability well above noise

stability_min_retention_beats_chance.claim: even the lowest elite-tier retention is several times the chance level: every system's top tier is far stickier than random

stability_per_stickier_than_bpm.claim: PER is more stable year to year than BPM, the opposite of their forecasting order

strong_consensus_wins_corr.claim: the two ratings agree very closely (r > 0.90)

team_anchored_box_is_mechanical.claim: the team-anchored box metrics top this test only mechanically (BPM is built to equal team point differential)

uber_concentration_moderate.claim: by center-robust steepness the consensus rating sits between the flattest metric (PER) and the steepest (Offensive BPM)

vorp_more_concentrated_than_per.claim: VORP top-5% share far exceeds PER

vorp_more_concentrated_than_ws.claim: VORP concentrates value more steeply than Win Shares
